channel.title: interpreter on Hugo O. Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in interpreter on Hugo O. Rivera

item.title: HelloWorlds
item.description: What is programming? Here you’ll find lots of introductory projects for many of different applications written in a variety of notable programming languages.

item.title: HelloWorlds
item.description: What is programming? Here you’ll find lots of introductory projects for many of different applications written in a variety of notable programming languages.

item.title: CORE
item.description: Implementation of SPJ’s Tutorial Core compilers in modern Haskell (unfinished)

item.title: SCMinHS
item.description: A Scheme Implementation in Haskell. Followed “Write Yourself a Scheme in 48 Hours.”
